mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (cart_id, product_id, quantity, created_at) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT ci.id AS item_id, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.image_url AS image_url, ci.quantity AS quantity, p.price * ci.quantity AS subtotal, p.status AS product_status FROM cart_item ci INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = ci.product_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #{cartId} ORDER BY ci.id ASC

SELECT ci.id AS item_id, p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.image_url AS image_url, ci.quantity AS quantity, p.price * ci.quantity AS subtotal, p.status AS product_status FROM cart_item ci INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = ci.product_id WHERE ci.id = #{itemId}
